interpretation: The v5 refresh manifest should satisfy the new training-gap-aware criteria gate.
That means every symbol must stay new versus the combined reference base and must enter with an explicit true-carry or clean-persistence hypothesis.
Pure opening-led clone logic is not an acceptable primary admission reason for this v5 refresh.
